title: [codereview-pass3] missing coap_respond helper and DTN buffer integration in coap_dtn
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:1-20 - Lacks shared coap_respond from coap_location.c:41 (duplication risk), no integration with lichen_dtn_buffer or rate limiting per spec 18.9. Payloads would use raw memcpy if implemented naively. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-pp9k
